zh.Totnes, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文托特斯

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Dunstanville於1142年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾勞斯頓時，她的父親Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall43歲，母親Beatrice FitzWilliam27歲。她於1165年與Ralph de Valletort在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1220年7月29日在她的家鄉享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Dunstanville于1142年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾勞斯頓时，她的父亲Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall43岁，母亲Beatrice FitzWilliam27岁。她于1165年与Ralph de Valletort在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1220年7月29日在她的家乡享年78岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Dunstanville was born in 1142, in Launceston, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, her father, Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall, was 43 and her mother, Beatrice FitzWilliam, was 27. She married Ralph de Valletort in 1165, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 29 July 1220, in her hometown, at the age of 78, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Dunstanville est née en 1142, à Launceston, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Beatrice FitzWilliam, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph de Valletort en 1165, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 29 juillet 1220, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Dunstanville 1142 in Launceston, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall 43 und ihre Mutter Beatrice FitzWilliam 27. Sie hat 1165 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Ralph de Valletort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 29. Juli 1220 im Alter von 78 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Dunstanville è nata il nel 1142 nel Launceston, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Beatrice FitzWilliam, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Ralph de Valletort nel 1165, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 29 luglio 1220, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Dunstanvilleが1142年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルラウンセストンで生まれた時，父Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwallは43歳，母Beatrice FitzWilliamは27歳であった。1165年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでRalph de Valletortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1220年7月29日に故郷で78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Dunstanville(이)가 1142년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 로스스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice FitzWilliam(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Ralph de Valletort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1220년 7월 29일 그녀의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Dunstanville nasceu em 1142, em Launceston, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice FitzWilliam, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph de Valletort em 1165, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 29 de julho de 1220, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Dunstanville родилась в 1142 г. в местности лаунсестон, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice FitzWilliam, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Valletort в 1165 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 29 июля 1220 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Dunstanville nació en 1142, en Launceston, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Beatrice FitzWilliam, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Ralph de Valletort en 1165, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 29 de julio de 1220, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
